- 2024-05-19 10:00 is already booked (Project Kick‑off, 10:00–11:00). Do you want me to pick the next available 1‑hour slot that day (earliest available), or do you have a preferred alternate time (examples I can offer: 09:00–10:00, 11:30–12:30, 13:00–14:00)?
